features.description: Database, performance tuning, and API modularization
steps: Verify SQLite optimizations, Network/Load headers (gzip, Cache-Control), and Domain-Driven Handler dependency injection (cmd/server/main.go)

features.description: Optimizing long-running tasks and CLI benchmarks
steps: Verify CLI benchmarks, slow-query logging (SLOW_QUERY_THRESHOLD_MS), stress generation progress UI, and parallel execution (goroutines/errgroup)
Verify security headers (CSP, HSTS, CSRF), track/scrub test artifacts from git history, and run secret scanner pre-commit gate

features.description: Manage user authentication flow and secure cookies
steps: Verify OAuth/Session cookie policies (SameSite=Lax/Strict) and cross-site OAuth callback validation

features.description: Global Theme Rollout & Design System Refinement to Earth theme
steps: Verify Earth theme palette (bg-earth/text-earth), typography (Inter/Playfair), and standard component styles across all pages
Verify modal_base shell reusability, Dark Theme integration, and global micro-animations (hover:scale-105) across all modals
Verify Bulk Upload functionality, Admin Users view, and Dark Theme rendering across the Admin Dashboard metrics/listings

features.description: Core application capabilities and user workflows
steps: Verify Claim Ownership workflow, Homepage Service listings, and Status Badge rendering across search/categories

features.description: Comprehensive test metric improvements and testing tools
steps: Verify CLI testing harness (api-spec, cli-drift validations)
Verify Baseline Coverage (>90%)
Verify Phase 1 test coverage (Priority 1) (Pending): Run `go test -v ./internal/middleware -run TestRateLimit` to verify critical rate-limiting coverage is met
Verify Phase 2 test coverage (Priority 2) (Pending): Run validation domain tests to ensure configuration validation passes
Verify Phase 3 test coverage (Priority 3) (Pending): Run mock and infrastructure testing suites and verify they execute successfully

features.description: Reducing duplication and streamlining API handlers
steps: Verify Pagination Standardization
Verify standard ErrorResponse JSON structure on 400 Error
Verify Response Helpers (Pending): Check for usage of `RenderSuccess`, `JSONSuccess`, and `ErrorResponse` handlers across controllers
Verify Base Handler Struct (Pending): Review handler method signatures to confirm they use a base struct to eliminate session parsing duplication
Verify Service Layer Consolidation (Pending): Inspect service layer structures and ensure validation middleware runs consistently
Verify Route Grouping (Completed): Inspect code and ensure auth-required routes are fully separated from public routes via grouped middleware

features.description: Verified all public, user, and admin routes are accessible and functional via the UI
steps: Verify successful navigation of Public (Home/About/Search), User (Profile/Create), Admin routes, and client form backend URL normalizer validations

features.description: Continuous integration, vulnerability scanning, and build workflows
steps: Verify Tailwind CLI compilation (no CDN), GitHub Actions pipeline (govulncheck, docker scout), and Fly.io deployment config validation

features.description: Refactoring features into dedicated services and domain packages
steps: Verify refactored ImageService, domain-level Hours of Operation string parsing, decoupled AuthMiddleware, and strict date parsing workflows

features.description: Features and architectural improvements planned for the next phase
steps: Verify Apple/Facebook Platforms (Pending): Click on 'Apple' and 'Facebook' login buttons in the identity section and configure dev accounts
Verify DevLogin Hardening (Pending): Ensure hitting the DevLogin route in a prod-like condition executes the real claim workflow instead of a skip mechanism
Verify Admin Customization (Pending): Navigate to Admin settings and inject a custom dashboard color or font, then confirm the page updates dynamically
Verify Expiration Ticker (Pending): Confirm that the background service correctly tags listings older than their configured TTL config as 'expired'
Verify Location Filter (Pending): Perform a map-based search query like `?filterLocation=City` and assert that the returned result list matches accurately
Verify Browser Integration Test (Pending): Trigger the browser integration test suite and verify 'Create Listing' finishes flawlessly start to end
Verify Security Hardening (Pending): Identify dependencies utilizing alpine:latest and ensure that CVE-2025-60876 patches are updated
Verify Fat Handler Structs (Pending): Use structural tag libraries rather than custom parsing to validate object bindings

features.description: Comprehensive security audit fixes and defense-in-depth improvements
steps: Verify ADMIN_CODE logic, Admin Login rate limits, Content-Security-Policy compliance (no inline scripts), HTMX bindings (`hx-on`), and local asset hosting

features.description: Comprehensive mapping of application routes and workflows for all user personas
steps: Verify Visitor, Authenticated User, and Admin comprehensive journeys, and local DB CLI tool maintenance integration

features.description: Refactor all scripts in the scripts/ directory to output structured JSON for robust agent consumption
steps: Verify script outputs (harness, drift check, CI gates, tests, utils) conform to standard JSON envelope contracts

features.description: Reduce token footprint of agent context by breaking monolithic specs and documentation into granular files.
steps: Verify monolithic specs (OpenAPI, BRAND_GUIDELINES, CLI commands) are successfully extracted into granular modular files (Completed)
Verify codebase documentation (AGENTS.md, Feature Workflows) is fully modularized into granular rules under `.agent/rules/` and `.agent/workflows/` (Completed)
Verify feature-implementation workflows (refactor.md) enforce proactive Code Smell evaluation, safe continuous refactoring loops, and strict test preservation (Completed)

features.description: Made featured listings persistent on all pagination pages
steps: Removed `page == 1` restriction in `HandleHome` and `HandleFragment`.
Added a failing test to verify featured prioritization on page 2.
